summary: Implementation review accepts Core real-site write-precheck result generation for #230/#231-#234.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Core records Xiaohongshu and BOSS write-precheck preview results from Harbor/Lode public refs into durable Run Record and Result Envelope metadata, preserving approval/cancellation/expiry and page_changed states without persisting private runtime material or submitted results.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The helper reuses existing task submission admission, requires active no-submit action_request facts, keeps preview_result.submitted false, records approval expired/blocked outcomes as terminal state, rejects mismatched approval requests, and adds targeted self-check coverage for success, page_changed, user_cancelled, expired approval, and forbidden private fields.
